reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Dropping the raw Harbor Candle product files here so they don't clog your email. Two folders: tins and gift sets.
Perfect, thank you. Telegram is so much easier for the big batches. Pulling them into the label comps now.
Let me know if you want any reshot. I kept the lighting warm to match your palette.

reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Pushed the Webflow staging build. Brand assets are wired to the CMS. Can you drop the final SVG logo here?
Sending now: lockup, favicon, and the lettering mark in three weights. Staging looks clean, Tyler.

reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Here are the styling moodboards for the Beacon winter shoot. Earth tones, minimal props, lots of negative space.
These are right on. I'll set the headline type against board two and share comps with Diane.

reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Sending our venue photos and the guest list spelling so the place cards are exact. Thank you for accommodating our hours.
Received. I'll proof every name twice and send a single PDF for your final sign-off before printing.

reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Voici le linge et l'encre que nous aimons. The swatch photo is in this drop.
Beautiful linen. I'll match the ink a shade warmer and send revised place cards by Friday.

reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Shared the shot list and the lettering layers for tomorrow's session. Jasmine, flag anything you want lit differently.
Looks great. I'll bring the 90mm for the close lettering details.

reply_to_message_id: Laura Mitchell — freelance brand designer and hand-letterer
text: Final assets are in. Going to deploy the brand site to production this week. Nice work on the type scale.
